app.privacy.title: Privacy Policy
app.privacy.s1.title: 1. Data Controller
app.privacy.s1.body: The data controller is Money Manager (JGM), reachable at winjgm.com and moneymanager@outlook.es. The server is hosted by Hetzner Online GmbH (Helsinki, Finland), within the European Union, so processing is governed by the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
app.privacy.s2.title: 2. Data We Collect
app.privacy.s2.intro: To provide the service we collect only the strictly necessary data:
app.privacy.s2.item1: Name and email address (registration and authentication).
app.privacy.s2.item2: Password (stored encrypted with bcrypt; never in plain text).
app.privacy.s2.item3: Optional profile picture (an image you upload yourself).
app.privacy.s2.item4: Personal financial data: transactions (amount, description, category, date), categories, budgets and automation rules you enter.
app.privacy.s2.item5: JWT session tokens, stored on your device (localStorage).
app.privacy.s3.title: 3. Purpose and Legal Basis
app.privacy.s3.intro: We use your data exclusively to:
app.privacy.s3.item1: Provide the personal finance management service (legal basis: contract performance, Art. 6.1.b GDPR).
app.privacy.s3.item2: Send transactional emails: account verification and password reset (legal basis: contract performance).
app.privacy.s3.item3: Generate AI financial analysis at your explicit request (legal basis: explicit consent, Art. 6.1.a GDPR).
app.privacy.s3.noMarketing: We do not carry out marketing, profiling or behavioural analysis.
app.privacy.s4.title: 4. Third Parties and International Transfers
app.privacy.s4.p1: We do not share your data with third parties for commercial purposes. The only providers involved are:
app.privacy.s4.item1: Hetzner Online GmbH (server hosting, EU — no transfer outside the EEA).
app.privacy.s4.item2: AI provider (financial analysis on demand): your monthly financial data is sent once only when you press 'Analyse month'. It is not stored on their servers.
app.privacy.s4.item3: Cloudflare (CDN and DNS): handles network traffic. See their policy at cloudflare.com/privacypolicy.
app.privacy.s5.title: 5. Data Retention
app.privacy.s5.p1: Your data is retained while you maintain an active account. If you delete your account, all your data is permanently erased within a maximum of 30 days.
app.privacy.s6.title: 6. Security
app.privacy.s6.p1: We apply the following technical measures:
app.privacy.s6.item2: Passwords hashed with bcrypt (high cost factor).
app.privacy.s6.item3: Authentication via short-lived JWT tokens with refresh token.
app.privacy.s6.item4: The server does not log personal data in access logs.
app.privacy.s7.title: 7. Your Rights (GDPR)
app.privacy.s7.intro: As a user you have the right to:
app.privacy.s7.item1: Access: request a copy of your data.
app.privacy.s7.item2: Rectification: correct inaccurate data from your profile.
app.privacy.s7.item3: Erasure ('right to be forgotten'): delete your account and all associated data.
app.privacy.s7.item4: Portability: export your transactions in CSV format from within the app.
app.privacy.s7.item5: Objection and restriction of processing: contact us at any time.
app.privacy.s7.item6: Complaint: if you believe we have violated your rights you may lodge a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Agency (aepd.es) or your local supervisory authority.
app.privacy.s8.title: 8. Cookies and Local Storage
app.privacy.s8.p1: This application does not use tracking or analytics cookies. It only uses the browser's localStorage to maintain your session (JWT token) and your language preference. This data is not shared with third parties.
app.privacy.s9.title: 9. Minors
app.privacy.s9.p1: The service is not directed at persons under 16 years of age. If you are under 16, you must not create an account or provide us with personal data.
app.privacy.s10.title: 10. Changes to This Policy
app.privacy.s10.p1: We may update this policy occasionally. We will notify you via an in-app notice. The last updated date will always be visible at the top of this page.
app.privacy.s11.title: 11. Account Deletion
app.privacy.s11.p1: You can permanently delete your account and all associated data directly from within the app at any time. No email or external form is required.
app.privacy.s11.step1: Open the app and log in.
app.privacy.s11.step2: Tap the profile icon (top right) to open your profile.
app.privacy.s11.step3: Scroll down and open the "Settings" section.
app.privacy.s11.step4: Tap "Delete account" and confirm in the dialog.
app.privacy.s11.p2: Upon confirmation, your account and all data (transactions, categories, budgets, recurring rules and profile picture) are permanently and irreversibly deleted from our servers.
app.privacy.contact.title: Contact
